messages.content: What is the purpose of the Geodude Candy item in Pokémon?
Geodude Candy is an item packed with energy that, when given to certain Pokémon, increases all of their stats at once.
What is the primary competitive role of Pincurchin, and which item is recommended to maximize its utility?

Pincurchin's primary niche is serving as the Electric Terrain setter for Electric Terrain teams due to its Electric Surge ability. To maximize the duration of the Electric Terrain, Terrain Extender is the recommended item.
What happens if a Pokémon uses Draining Kiss while the target has the Liquid Ooze Ability?
If the target possesses the Liquid Ooze Ability, the user will lose the amount of HP they would have otherwise gained from using Draining Kiss.
What is the primary function of a Key Stone in the Pokémon world?
The Key Stone is an essential item used to trigger Mega Evolution in Pokémon.
What is the effect of using the Sacred Ash item on your Pokémon party?
When used, Sacred Ash revives all fainted Pokémon in the party and restores their HP to its maximum value.
What is the primary role of Thundurus in ORAS OU and what are some of its key moves and items?

Thundurus is a top offensive threat and pivot in ORAS OU that utilizes its Prankster ability for priority Thunder Wave to check sweepers. Key moves include Nasty Plot for sweeping, Volt Switch for momentum, Focus Blast to hit Excadrill and Ferrothorn, and Hidden Power Ice for coverage against Ground, Grass, and Dragon-types. It typically holds Leftovers to help with its lack of recovery and Stealth Rock weakness.
What is the move Heat Wave and what does it do?
Heat Wave is a Fire-type move introduced in Generation III. When used in a battle, it deals damage to all adjacent opponents and has a 10% chance to burn each target hit.
How does the move Meteor Beam function in battle?
Meteor Beam is a two-turn move. On the first turn, the user gathers energy from space to boost its Sp. Atk stat. On the second turn, the user attacks the target, inflicting regular damage.
What kind of Pokémon is Nincada?
Nincada is a dual-type Bug/Ground Pokémon.
What is the recommended moveset and ability for a competitive Zebstrika in the BW metagame?

Zebstrika's moveset includes Thunderbolt as its primary STAB, Volt Switch for pivoting, Overheat for Grass-types like Maractus and Shiftry, and Hidden Power Ice for Ground-types like Gabite and Torterra. Lightning Rod is the preferred ability to switch into Electric-type attacks, though Sap Sipper is an alternative to check Grass-types like Jumpluff and Simisage.
At what level does Paras evolve into Parasect?
Paras evolves into Parasect at level 24.
What items can Barbaracle use for a Shell Smash set, and what are the pros and cons of each?

Barbaracle can run Life Orb for increased damage output, enabling OHKOs on bulkless Celebi and Metagross, though the recoil and Shell Smash defensive drops make it easy to revenge kill. Alternatively, White Herb can be used to negate the Defense and Special Defense drops from Shell Smash, allowing Barbaracle to take less damage during setup.
What is the name of the move described in the text?
The move described in the text is Power Shift.
What is the function of the item Hm07 in Pokémon?

Hm07 is an item used to teach the move Waterfall to a compatible Pokémon. Waterfall is a powerful charge attack that allows the user to attack a foe at high speed, and it also functions as a tool for the player to climb waterfalls.
What is the primary effect of the Marvel Scale ability in Pokémon?
The Marvel Scale ability increases the user's Defense stat by 50% whenever the Pokémon is affected by a status condition, such as burn, paralysis, poison, sleep, or freeze.
What is the primary function of the Beach Glass item in Pokémon?
The Beach Glass is a Buddy Souvenir that serves no practical or functional purpose other than to be sold for value.
What is the primary function of the Park Ball item?
The Park Ball is a special Poké Ball designed for use in Pal Park, where it is used by a trainer to catch a wild Pokémon during a battle.
What is the primary effect of the move Glare?
Glare is a move that paralyzes the target.
What is the secondary effect of the move Bolt Strike and what is its probability of occurring?
Bolt Strike has a 20% chance of paralyzing the target in addition to inflicting damage.
What is the primary role of Hatterene in SV competitive play and how does it utilize specific moves to support its team?

Hatterene acts as an entry hazard control option on bulky offense and offense teams, utilizing Magic Bounce to check threats like Zamazenta and Great Tusk. Psychic Noise blocks recovery from walls, Draining Kiss provides recovery and chips foes, Pain Split wears down high-HP walls, and Nuzzle spreads paralysis to disrupt sweepers and safe switches. Rocky Helmet or Leftovers are used for utility, and 52 Speed EVs allow it to outspeed Garganacl and Toxapex to block their recovery.
What is the effect of the Poison-type move Poison Jab?
Poison Jab is a damage-dealing move that has a 30% chance of leaving the target poisoned.
What is unique about the way Totodile sleeps?

As shown in Pokémon Sleep, Totodile and its evolutions practice unihemispheric sleep, where they sleep with one eye open and rest only half of their brain at a time. This is hypothesized to be a defense mechanism against enemy attacks.
What is the name of the Pokémon species described in the text?
The Pokémon species described in the text is Eiscue.
What is the primary effect of the move Shadow Mist in Pokémon XD: Gale of Darkness?
Shadow Mist is a Shadow move that functions similarly to Sweet Scent, lowering the evasion of both opponents by two stages each.
How does the move Secret Sword determine the damage it inflicts on a target?
Secret Sword inflicts regular damage and always calculates it using the target's Defense stat, regardless of the move's damage class.
What happens if a Walrein breaks one of its ivory tusks during a battle?
Walrein's tusks grow continuously throughout its life. If a tusk breaks during battle, it will grow back by the following year.
At what level does a Weedle evolve into Kakuna?
Weedle evolves into Kakuna starting at level 7.
How does the Cloud Nine ability affect weather during a Pokémon battle?
While a Pokémon with the Cloud Nine ability is in battle, weather conditions may still be present, but the ability negates all of their effects. This function is identical to the Air Lock ability.
In which Pokémon game is the Sapphire item classified as a Key Item?
The Sapphire item is classified as a Key Item in the games Pokémon FireRed and LeafGreen.
What is Klinklang's role in the ZU tier and how should its EVs be distributed to maximize its performance?

Klinklang is a terrifying sweeper in ZU that utilizes Shift Gear to boost its speed and attack. To perform at its best, it should use 156 Speed EVs to outspeed Choice Scarf Manectric after a boost, with the remaining EVs invested in bulk to help it survive hits from revenge killers like Thwackey and Kangaskhan.
What is the potential side effect of using the move Aurora Beam?
Aurora Beam inflicts regular damage and has a percentage chance to lower the target's Attack stat by one stage.
What happens in Pokémon UNITE if an enemy is hit by all three chunks of Mamoswine's Ice Shard?
If an enemy is hit by all three chunks of ice from Mamoswine's Ice Shard in Pokémon UNITE, they are left frozen for a short period of time.
How does the damage of the move Salt Cure vary based on the target's typing?
Salt Cure normally inflicts 1/8 of the target's maximum HP as damage per turn. However, if the target is a Steel or Water type, the damage increases to 1/4 of its maximum HP per turn.
At what level does Yamask evolve into Cofagrigus?
Yamask evolves into Cofagrigus at level 34.
What is the primary reason to include Galvantula on a competitive team in the UnderUsed tier?

The primary reason to run Galvantula is its access to Sticky Web, which reduces the Speed of the opponent's Pokémon by one stage when they switch into battle. This allows Galvantula to take advantage of faster grounded Pokémon by slowing them down.
How does the move Mach Punch behave when used in battle?
Mach Punch is a move that inflicts regular damage and always goes first, ensuring that the user strikes before the opponent.
What is the recommended defensive strategy and item for Mandibuzz in the XY competitive tier?

Mandibuzz functions as a defensive pivot by utilizing maximum HP and Special Defense EVs along with Leftovers for passive recovery. Its kit includes Roost for reliable healing, Foul Play to check physical attackers, Defog for hazard removal, and either U-turn for momentum or Knock Off for item removal. The Overcoat ability is used to counter Roserade by providing immunity to Sleep Powder.
What is the recommended EV spread and nature for Celesteela to maximize its defensive capabilities?

Celesteela should use a Sassy nature to boost its bulk without reducing its offensive power. The EV spread utilizes 24 Defense EVs to survive a Jolly Mega Medicham's High Jump Kick, while the remaining EVs are invested into Special Defense to handle threats like Mega Alakazam, Tapu Lele, and Mega Latios. A spread of 252 HP is also an optional consideration.
What is the primary effect of the Motor Drive ability in Pokémon?
Motor Drive is an ability that makes a Pokémon immune to all Electric-type moves. When hit by an Electric-type move, the Pokémon's Speed stat is increased by one stage instead of taking damage.
How should a player train and equip a competitive Nasty Plot Decidueye in the SM metagame?

To play Nasty Plot Decidueye effectively, use a Timid nature with maximum Speed and Special Attack EVs. Equip Ghostium Z to transform Shadow Ball into the powerful Never-Ending Nightmare. Key moves include Nasty Plot for setup, Shadow Ball for neutral coverage, Leaf Storm as a primary attack, and Roost for recovery. This build aims to outrun foes like Incineroar and Xatu while leveraging boost-dependent OHKOs against threats like Weezing and Vikavolt.
What happens when a Pokémon with the Volt Absorb ability is hit by an Electric-type move?

When hit by an Electric-type move, the Pokémon has its HP restored by 1/4 of its maximum HP instead of taking damage. This effect applies to both damaging moves and non-damaging moves like Thunder Wave, though it will not trigger if the Pokémon is a ground-type and immune to the move.
What are some effective teammates for Flapple to help it overcome its poor defensive bulk and weaknesses?

Flapple benefits from bulky pivots like Uxie, Alolan Persian, and Rotom-S to help it enter the field safely. Coalossal and Qwilfish offer entry hazard support and pressure Fairy-types like Alcremie and Clefairy, while Ninetales and Rapidash assist by checking Ice- and Steel-types such as Articuno and Klinklang.
What is the primary effect of holding a Mystic Water item in battle?
The Mystic Water is a hold item that increases the power of the holder's Water-type moves by 20%.
At what level does Cosmoem evolve into Solgaleo or Lunala?
Cosmoem evolves into either Solgaleo or Lunala at level 53.
What is the recommended moveset, item, and EV spread for an offensive Swanna in XY?

The recommended offensive set utilizes Hurricane and Scald for STAB, Defog for utility, and Roost for recovery. Players should use a Life Orb to boost damage, a Timid nature, and maximum EV investment in Special Attack and Speed. Alternatively, if on a rain team, Rest can be used in place of Roost to capitalize on the Hydration ability.
At what level does a Metang evolve into a Metagross?
A Metang evolves into a Metagross at level 45.
What is the legend regarding the origin of Frillish?
There is a legend that states Frillish were created from the transformed residents of a sunken ancient city.
How does Pika Papow function as a move and what happens if you forget it?

Pika Papow inflicts regular damage, and its power increases the more Pikachu loves its Trainer. The move never misses, but it cannot be used, and it is recommended that it be forgotten. Once forgotten, Pika Papow cannot be remembered.
What is Comfey's role as a Terrain sweeper and which teammate is required to support this strategy?

As a Terrain sweeper, Comfey utilizes Calm Mind and Triage-boosted Draining Kiss to revenge kill weakened threats and maintain health. Thwackey is a required partner for this strategy, as it immediately sets Grassy Terrain upon switching in and helps weaken Comfey's checks, such as Poison- and Steel-types, using Knock Off and U-turn.
What happens if a user holds an Iron Ball while using the move Magnet Rise?
If the user is holding an Iron Ball, Magnet Rise can still be used, but the user remains on the ground until the Iron Ball is removed.
What is the primary role of Eternatus in the Ubers tier, and how do different Tera types affect its performance?

Eternatus serves as a premier special attacker in Ubers, often acting as a wallbreaker. Tera Dragon amplifies its Dynamax Cannon to 2HKO Ho-Oh or 3HKO Ting-Lu. Tera Fire provides STAB for Fire Blast and removes weaknesses to Dragon and Psychic types, while also granting resistances to Steel and Fairy attacks to help against Zacian-C and Necrozma-DM.
What is the evolution chain for Tyrunt and at what level does it evolve into Tyrantrum?
Tyrunt evolves into Tyrantrum upon reaching level 39.
What is the primary effect of the Focus Sash when held by a Pokémon?
The Focus Sash is a held item that allows the holder to survive a single one-hit knockout move with 1 HP remaining, provided that the Pokémon is at full HP when the move hits.
What is the primary effect of using Seel Candy on a Pokémon?
Seel Candy is a Pokémon item packed with energy that, when given to certain Pokémon, increases all of their stats at once.
What is the function of the N-Solarizer Split item?
The N-Solarizer Split is a machine used to separate Necrozma, which required light, from Solgaleo.
What is the move Shed Tail and how does it function in battle?
Shed Tail is a move where the user creates a substitute for itself using its own HP, after which the user switches places with a party Pokémon in waiting.
What is the purpose of the Power Plant Pass in Pokémon?
The Power Plant Pass acts as an ID card that permits entry to the Kalos Power Plant, which is located along Route 13.
What is the primary effect of the Ability Pressure when a move targets a Pokémon that possesses it?

When a move targets a Pokémon with the Pressure Ability, one additional PP is deducted from that move beyond the normal amount. This effect applies even if the move misses, hits multiple targets, or fails due to Protect or Detect.
What are the base stats and primary abilities of the Fossil Pokémon Aerodactyl?

Aerodactyl has a base HP of 80, Attack of 105, Defense of 65, Sp. Atk of 60, Sp. Def of 75, and Speed of 130. Its primary abilities are Rock Head and Pressure, and it also possesses the hidden ability Unnerve.
What is the recommended EV spread for a Choice Specs Noivern and why?
The recommended EV spread is 252 SpA / 252 Spe to maximize offensive power and speed. Additionally, 4 SpD EVs are included to prevent a Download Porygon-Z from receiving a Special Attack boost.
What happens when a Pokémon holds Black Sludge during a battle?

If the holder is a Poison-type Pokémon, it restores 1/16 of its maximum HP at the end of each turn. If the holder is not a Poison-type, it takes damage equal to 1/8 of its maximum HP at the end of each turn, unless the Pokémon has the Magic Guard ability, which grants immunity to this damage.
What effect does the move Withdraw have on a Pokémon?
Withdraw is a move that raises the user's Defense stat by one stage by having the Pokémon withdraw its body into its hard shell.
What are some of the primary weaknesses and threats that Ferrothorn faces in battle?

Ferrothorn suffers from abysmal Speed and notable weaknesses to Fighting and Fire-type moves, making it vulnerable to threats like Mega Medicham, Mega Charizard X, and Heatran. Additionally, its reliance on indirect damage can be negated by Magic Guard users like Clefable, and the lack of reliable healing becomes a significant issue if it loses its Leftovers item.
What are the base stats of the Paradox Pokémon Iron Hands?
Iron Hands has the following base stats: HP 154, Attack 140, Defense 108, Sp. Atk 50, Sp. Def 68, and Speed 50.
What type of damage does the move Hyper Voice inflict?
Hyper Voice is a move that inflicts regular damage by using sound waves to create a loud, resounding shout that injures the target.
At what level does Bunnelby evolve into Diggersby?
Bunnelby evolves into Diggersby at level 20.
What is the primary role of Stoutland when used as a Ride Pokémon in the Alola region?
In the Alola region, Stoutland is used as a Ride Pokémon referred to as Stoutland Search, which utilizes its strong nose to locate hidden items.
How does the Ability Illusion function in battle?
The Ability Illusion allows a Pokémon to take on the appearance of the last Pokémon in the player's party, mimicking its looks while concealing its true identity.
What makes Magic Guard a valuable ability for Sigilyph in the RU tier?

Magic Guard allows Sigilyph to avoid all forms of passive damage, such as Life Orb recoil, while also being able to utilize reliable recovery via Roost. This makes it difficult to KO and allows it to effectively run defensive Calm Mind sets to push past its typical checks and counters.
What information does the Data Card 18 record in the game?
The Data Card 18 is a Pokémon item that records the number of times a trainer has won the Pokéathlon Circle Push event.
What items can Amoonguss hold in competitive SV play and what are their specific benefits?

Amoonguss can hold Heavy-Duty Boots to avoid entry hazard damage that interferes with Regenerator, Rocky Helmet to deal chip damage to physical attackers and U-turn users like Grimmsnarl and Zoroark, or Eject Button to provide a one-time pivot that pairs well with its Regenerator ability.
What is the primary effect of using the move Night Slash in battle?
Night Slash is a move that inflicts regular damage and features a high critical-hit ratio, meaning the user's critical hit rate is one level higher than normal.
What is the Winking Pika Pick used for in Pokémon Generation IX?
The Winking Pika Pick is a picnic item introduced in Generation IX that is used to complete a sandwich made during a picnic.
What is the evolution chain for Tinkatuff and at what level does it evolve into Tinkaton?
The evolution chain is Tinkatink, which evolves into Tinkatuff at level 24, and then into Tinkaton at level 38.
What is the primary role of Lunala in competitive play and what items or abilities make it effective?

Lunala serves as a defensive mainstay that excels in long games by acting as a blanket check to dangerous threats like Groudon, Zygarde-C, Zekrom, and Rayquaza. Its effectiveness is anchored by the Shadow Shield ability, which reduces damage when at full HP, and Heavy-Duty Boots, which allows it to maintain that full HP threshold by negating entry hazard damage. Combined with Roost for reliable recovery, these tools allow it to check threats consistently.
At what level does Houndour evolve into Houndoom, and what are Houndoom's available abilities?
Houndour evolves into Houndoom at level 24. Houndoom's available abilities are Early Bird and Flash Fire, with Unnerve as its hidden ability.
What happens if a Pokémon with Poison Point is hit by a multistrike move that makes contact?
If a Pokémon with Poison Point is hit by a multistrike move that makes contact, each individual hit has an independent 30% chance to poison the attacking Pokémon.
Why is Calyrex considered unviable in the SS ZU tier?

Calyrex is unviable in SS ZU due to poor typing, a lack of offensive coverage, and difficulty setting up. Top Pokémon like Klinklang and Skuntank resist or are immune to its attacks, while Articuno walls it by removing its boosts with Haze or dealing significant damage. It is outperformed by Galarian Rapidash, which possesses superior speed, reliable recovery, better defensive typing, and offensive coverage.
What is the specific requirement for a Clefairy to evolve into a Clefable?
Clefairy evolves into Clefable when it is exposed to a Moon Stone.
What is the significance of the Blue Petal in Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon?

The Blue Petal is a Key Item collected during Mina's trial. Once the player collects all seven petals, Mina combines them to create a Rainbow Flower. Additionally, Lana notes that the Blue Petal has the same shape as a Wishiwashi's scale.
What is the primary effect of the move taught by TM70?
TM70 teaches the move Flash, which involves the user flashing a bright light to cut the target's accuracy. Additionally, it can be used to illuminate caves.
What are the two common item choices for a Quiver Dance Lilligant and how do they benefit it?

Life Orb is used to provide Lilligant with the extra firepower it desperately needs, while Leftovers offers passive recovery, allowing it to more easily acquire Quiver Dance boosts against passive opponents like Galarian Stunfisk.
What are the effects of the Pewter Crunchies item in the Pokémon games?
Pewter Crunchies is a famous crunchy snack from Pewter City that can be used to heal all status conditions of a single Pokémon.
How can a player obtain Lugia in Pokémon Pokopia using the Tidal Bell?

In Pokémon Pokopia, a player must first craft the Tidal Bell using five Silver Feathers and five ingots of Rare Pokémetal, a recipe learned after befriending Articuno, Zapdos, and Moltres. Once the player has the bell, they can ring it when Lugia is flying overhead to cause it to descend, which then allows the player to befriend it.
What is a unique attribute of the Pokémon move Aqua Jet?
Aqua Jet is a move that deals regular damage and is guaranteed to always go first.
What move is taught by the item Tm30?
The item Tm30 teaches the move Shadow Ball to a compatible Pokémon.
What is the primary effect of using the item TR46 in battle?
TR46 is an item that causes the user to harden its body's surface like iron, which results in a sharp increase to the user's Defense stat.
What is the primary effect of the Cursed Body ability when a Pokémon is hit by a move?
When a Pokémon with the Cursed Body ability is hit by a move, there is a 30% chance that the move will become disabled for four turns.
What is the effect of using the move Sharpen, and how does it change when used as Z-Sharpen?

Sharpen is a non-damaging Normal-type move that increases the user's Attack stat by one stage. When powered up by a Normalium Z into Z-Sharpen, the user's Attack stat is increased by an additional stage, resulting in a total increase of two stages.
What is the function of the Sceptilite item in a Pokémon battle?
Sceptilite is a Mega Stone that allows Sceptile to Mega Evolve into Mega Sceptile during battle when held by the Pokémon.
What items and moves are recommended to help Miraidon perform as a wallbreaker and pivot in competitive play?

Miraidon utilizes Heavy-Duty Boots to increase longevity by ignoring entry hazards and Sticky Web. Key moves include U-turn for pivoting, Taunt to stop defensive setup or entry hazards, and Calm Mind to boost power for breaking through checks like Necrozma-DM or Ting-Lu. Solar Beam is an alternative for damaging Ground-types like Ting-Lu and Arceus-Ground, provided there is sun support.
How does Lileep hunt for prey in its natural environment?
Lileep hunts by waving its tentacles to disguise itself as seaweed, which attracts prey. Once the prey is close, Lileep entangles it and swallows it whole.
What secondary effect does the move Psychic have on a target?
Psychic is a damage-dealing move that has a 10% chance of lowering the target's Special Defense by one stage.
What effect does the move Grav Apple have on a target's stats?
In addition to inflicting regular damage, the move Grav Apple lowers the target's Defense stat by one stage.
What happens when a Pokémon with the Ability Anticipation enters a battle and identifies a threat?

When a Pokémon with Anticipation enters a battle or gains the Ability, it will "shudder" if an opponent possesses a damaging move that is super effective against it, a one-hit knockout move, or Self-Destruct or Explosion. This shuddering has no mechanical effect but serves to inform the player about possible moves the opponent may have.
What happens if a Pokémon with the Skill Link ability uses the move Spike Cannon?
When a Pokémon with the Ability Skill Link uses Spike Cannon, the move will always hit five times, provided that it does not miss.
What is the effect of using Icy Wind in a Contest Spectacular if Hail was used in the previous turn?
If the move Hail was used in the turn prior to using Icy Wind in a Contest Spectacular, the user gains an extra three appeal points.
What is the catch rate multiplier of a Safari Ball, and where can it be used?
The Safari Ball has a catch rate multiplier of 1.5×. It can only be used in the Kanto safari zone and the Great Marsh.
What is the recommended EV spread and nature for a defensive Seismitoad in XY, and why?
The recommended build uses maximum HP and Defense EVs with a Bold nature. This investment allows Seismitoad to effectively take on physical attackers by maximizing its physical bulk.
What is the primary role of the Calm Mind Mega Audino set, and how can you make it more resistant to status conditions?

Calm Mind allows Mega Audino to become a highly effective wincon by boosting its Special Attack and Special Defense, making it difficult to defeat with special attacks. To make Mega Audino less vulnerable to status effects like Toxic, players can use a Rest + Sleep Talk combination instead of Wish + Protect, transforming it into a more dedicated wincon.
What is the evolution method for a Petilil and how does it change based on the region?

Petilil evolves into Lilligant when exposed to a Sun Stone. In the Hisui region, exposure to a Sun Stone causes Petilil to evolve into Hisuian Lilligant, which gains the Fighting type due to the snowy mountainous landscape.
How does the move Substitute function in a battle?

Substitute transfers 1/4 of the user's max HP to create a doll that absorbs damage and blocks most negative move effects, such as major status conditions, confusion, flinching, and specific moves like Leech Seed or Intimidate. The doll disappears if the user leaves the field or if its HP reaches zero. It does not absorb self-inflicted damage like recoil or confusion, and it does not affect moves that rely on the user's actual HP.
What is the effect of a Rock Gem when held by a Pokémon?

When held by a Pokémon, the Rock Gem increases the power of the first Rock-type move used by 50% (or 30%, as noted in the text) and is consumed after use. Additionally, Fling will fail if the user is holding this item.
What is the purpose of the Pokémon item known as Data Card 09?
Data Card 09 is a Pokémon item used to hold Pokéathlon records; specifically, it records and shows the number of times a trainer has won the Pokéathlon Disc Catch.
How many times can the move Fury Swipes hit a target in a single turn?
The move Fury Swipes hits two to five times in a row.
What is the primary effect of the Synchronize ability in Pokémon?
When a Pokémon with the Synchronize ability is burned, paralyzed, or poisoned by another Pokémon, that Pokémon is inflicted with the same status condition.
What kind of relationship does Hippowdon have with Dwebble?

Hippowdon has a mutualistic relationship with Dwebble. Dwebble clears any stones that get stuck in the ports on Hippowdon's back, and in exchange, Hippowdon provides Dwebble with shelter and protection.
What effect does the Soothe Bell have on a Pokémon's friendship level when held?

When held by a Pokémon, the Soothe Bell increases the holder's friendship by amplifying any friendship gains by 50%. It only increases the original friendship boost and does not affect bonuses granted by the Luxury Ball or the Pokémon's met location.
What is the function of the Roto Hatch item in Pokémon?
Roto Hatch is one of the Rotom Powers, and its specific function is to help Pokémon Eggs hatch faster.
What does Sawk do to increase its power and why does it train in secluded mountains?
Sawk ties its black belt to increase its power. It trains in secluded mountains to increase its strength, and it becomes angered if its training is interrupted.
How does Luxio communicate with others of its own kind?
Luxio communicates with others of its kind by resting its claws on their forelegs and sending electrical pulses through them.
Is Meltan a viable competitive Pokémon for checking Klinklang?

No, Meltan is not recommended. While it can trap Klinklang using the ability Magnet Pull and PP stall with Acid Armor, it is otherwise useless and has terrible stats and a lackluster movepool. Other options like Palossand, Qwilfish, Rapidash, Alolan Persian, and Stunfisk are superior because they can perform additional roles even when the opponent does not have a Klinklang.
What are the secondary effects of the Fire-type move Fire Fang?

Fire Fang is a damage-dealing move that has a 10% chance of burning the target. Additionally, if the user attacks before the target, there is an independent 10% chance to make the target flinch. Notably, it is the only Fire-type move capable of causing the target to flinch.
What kind of Pokémon is Barbaracle?
Barbaracle is a Rock/Water-type Pokémon.
What is the function of the Mewnium Z item?
Mewnium Z is a Pokémon item that converts Z-Power into crystals, which upgrades Mew's Psychic move into an exclusive Z-Move.
What is the function of the Water Memory item when held by a Silvally?
When held by a Silvally, the Water Memory item changes the Pokémon to its Water form and changes the type of the move Multi-Attack to Water.
What is the secondary effect of the move Mist Ball?
Mist Ball inflicts regular damage and has a percentage chance to lower the target's Special Attack by one stage.
What is the primary function of the item Aerodactylite?
Aerodactylite is a mysterious Mega Stone that, when held by Aerodactyl, enables it to Mega Evolve during battle.
How does Cinderace perform as a niche attacker in the Ubers metagame?

Cinderace functions as a niche attacker in Ubers thanks to Libero, which boosts its damage output, and the move Court Change, which provides rare entry hazard control. While it struggles with a lackluster Attack stat, poor bulk, and a Stealth Rock weakness necessitating Heavy-Duty Boots, its speed allows it to outrun threats like Groudon and Kyogre. It effectively utilizes moves like Pyro Ball, Gunk Shot, Zen Headbutt, and Sucker Punch to threaten common staples such as Necrozma-DM, Xerneas, and Calyrex-S.
What effect does the Electric Gem have when held by a Pokémon?
When a Pokémon holds an Electric Gem, the power of its next damaging electric-type move is increased by 1.5 times. After this move is used, the item is consumed.
How does the Ability Air Lock affect weather conditions in battle?

When a Pokémon with the Air Lock Ability is in battle, all effects of existing weather conditions are negated, although the weather itself does not disappear. When the Pokémon enters the battle, the message "The effects of weather disappeared." is displayed.
What is the primary effect of the move Metal Claw in battle?
Metal Claw is a damage-dealing Steel-type move that has a 10% chance to raise the user's Attack stat by one stage.
How does Dragapult utilize Choice Specs in SS OU to maximize its effectiveness?

Dragapult uses Choice Specs to boost its Special Attack, allowing it to take full advantage of its wide special movepool that can hit the entire metagame at least neutrally. It uses its powerful STAB Draco Meteor to potentially take out specific threats like specially defensive Garchomp and Weavile in one hit, and Shadow Ball as a reliable, spammable STAB move.
What is the effect of the move Dark Pulse on a target?
Dark Pulse inflicts regular damage and has a chance to make the target flinch.
Why is Durant often considered outclassed as a wallbreaker in SM competitive play?

Durant is outclassed because it suffers from massive accuracy issues due to Hustle, has poor defensive stats that limit its utility, and lacks priority moves. While it can break checks like Rotom-H, superior alternatives like Scizor, Mega Steelix, and Bisharp offer more reliability, better defensive utility, or stronger priority to handle fast threats.
At what level does Wooloo evolve into Dubwool?
Wooloo evolves into Dubwool at level 24.
What is the purpose of Ponyta Candy?
Ponyta Candy is a Pokémon item packed with energy that, when given to certain Pokémon, increases all of their stats at once.
At what levels does Fuecoco evolve into its subsequent forms?
Fuecoco evolves into Crocalor starting at level 16, and then evolves into Skeledirge starting at level 36.
What move is taught by the Pokémon item Tm22?
The item Tm22 teaches the move SolarBeam to compatible Pokémon. It is a two-turn attack where the user gathers sunlight on the first turn and blasts the foe with absorbed energy on the second turn.
What is the likelihood of a Pokémon with Quick Draw going first when using a damaging move, and how does it interact with a held Quick Claw?

A Pokémon with Quick Draw has a 30% chance to move first when using a damaging move. If a Pokémon carries both Quick Draw and a Quick Claw, there is a combined 44% chance of either ability activating. If Quick Draw activates, the held Quick Claw will not.
How does the Magician ability work when a Pokémon uses a move?
The Magician ability allows a Pokémon to steal the held item from any target it hits when using a damaging move.
How does the move Magical Leaf function when used in battle?
Magical Leaf is a move where the user scatters curious leaves that seek out the target. Because the attack unerringly hits the target, it cannot be avoided by accuracy or evasion modifications.
What are the base stats for Tyrogue?
Tyrogue has a base stat of 35 for each of its stats, including HP, Attack, Defense, Sp. Atk, Sp. Def, and Speed.
Which move is only known to be learned by Hawlucha through leveling up?
Hawlucha is the only Pokémon known to learn the move Flying Press by leveling up.
What is the primary effect of the move Smack Down?

Smack Down is a Rock-type damage-dealing move that knocks the target out of the air. If the target is a Flying-type Pokémon or is currently under the effect of moves like Fly, Bounce, or Sky Drop, it will be grounded after being hit by Smack Down, making it susceptible to Ground-type moves and entry hazards like Spikes or Toxic Spikes.
What is the function of the Lens Case in Generation VI and later games?
The Lens Case is a Key Item that allows players to store colored contact lenses. By using these lenses in fitting rooms, players can change their eye color.
Under what specific conditions does the Quark Drive ability activate to boost a Pokémon's most proficient stat?
The Quark Drive ability boosts the Pokémon's most proficient stat when the Pokémon is on Electric Terrain or if it is holding the item known as Booster Energy.
What is a unique secondary effect that occurs when a frozen Pokémon uses the move Sacred Fire?
When a frozen Pokémon uses the move Sacred Fire, the move will cause the Pokémon to thaw out.
What is the primary function of the Pass Orb item in the game?
The Pass Orb acts as currency used to activate Pass Powers in the Entralink. It is a mysterious orb containing the power of the Unova region that is utilized when generating Pass Power.
How does Decidueye's ability Long Reach benefit it in competitive play?

The Long Reach ability allows Decidueye to avoid the negative effects of contact-based abilities and items, specifically protecting it from Chandelure's Flame Body, Bellibolt's Static, and Rocky Helmet.
What is the recommended moveset, item, and nature for Lokix in SV competitive play, and what role does it fulfill?

Lokix uses First Impression, Knock Off, Sucker Punch, and U-turn. It holds Heavy-Duty Boots, runs an Adamant nature, and utilizes the Tinted Lens ability. Tera Bug is crucial for boosting its damage output. It serves as a revenge killer on balance and offense teams, utilizing its moves to pick off offensive threats and bring teammates in safely through U-turn.
What is the recommended usage of the Eject Pack item on Tatsugiri in competitive play?

Eject Pack is used on some offensive VoltTurn teams as an alternative to Heavy-Duty Boots. While it reduces Tatsugiri's bulk and consistency at removing entry hazards, it helps preserve momentum by allowing a wallbreaker to be brought onto the field immediately after Tatsugiri uses Draco Meteor.
How does the Ability Skill Link affect the move Double Slap?
When a Pokémon with the Ability Skill Link uses Double Slap, the move will always hit five times, provided that it does not miss.
How does the move Psywave calculate the amount of damage it inflicts?
Psywave inflicts typeless damage that is determined at random, ranging from 50% to 150% of the user's level. The damage is calculated in increments of 10%.
What effect does the Power Bracer have on a Pokémon's stats during battle?

When held by a Pokémon, the Power Bracer decreases the holder's Speed stat by 50%. Additionally, it increases the Attack effort gained from battle by 4, which occurs before any PokéRUS doubling effect is applied.
What is the primary effect of the Teravolt ability during battle?

The Teravolt ability allows a Pokémon's moves to ignore the abilities of a target that would otherwise hinder or prevent the move's effects. This includes abilities that negate moves, prevent effects, or grant protective benefits. Abilities are only nullified while the move is being used, and this ability functions identically to Mold Breaker and Turboblaze.
What are the base stats for the Normal-type Pokemon Zangoose?
Zangoose has a base HP of 73, Attack of 115, Defense of 60, Special Attack of 60, Special Defense of 60, and Speed of 90.
What is the specific requirement for Wishiwashi to be able to change its form using the Schooling ability?

Wishiwashi can change forms using the Schooling ability once it has reached level 20. It switches to School Form if its HP is above 25% when entering a battle or ending a turn, and reverts to Solo Form if its HP drops below 25%.
What is the recommended competitive setup for Cinccino to function effectively as a lead or sweeper?

Cinccino should run maximum Attack and Speed investment with a Jolly nature. The preferred ability is Skill Link to maximize the damage of multi-hit moves like Tail Slap, Bullet Seed, and Rock Blast. Choice Band is recommended for maximum damage, while Life Orb offers versatility at the cost of recoil. Useful moves include Knock Off for Ghost-types and item removal, or U-turn to maintain momentum.
What happens when a Pokémon with the Flash Fire ability is hit by a Fire-type move?

When a Pokémon with Flash Fire is hit by a Fire-type move, it becomes immune to the damage and its ability is activated. Upon activation, the power of the Pokémon's own Fire-type moves is increased by 50% through a boost to its Attack or Special Attack during damage calculation.
What is the primary effect of the Pokémon move Flash on a target?
The move Flash lowers the target's accuracy by one stage.
What specific type of Poké Ball can be created using a Yellow Apricorn?
A Yellow Apricorn can be used to make a Moon Ball by Kurt.
What is the recommended moveset and strategy for Choice Specs Zoroark in SV competitive?

Choice Specs Zoroark functions as a wallbreaker using Illusion to surprise opponents. Its recommended moves include Dark Pulse for primary STAB, Sludge Bomb for Fairy-types, Trick to cripple bulkier Pokemon, and Focus Blast or U-turn for utility. Tera Dark is preferred for wallbreaking power, though Tera Poison or Fighting offer specific defensive or offensive advantages. It pairs well with Spikes setters and physical wallbreakers to help overcome its checks.
What is the primary function of the Reply Mail item in Pokémon?

Reply Mail is stationery used to send short messages to other players when trading Pokémon. A trainer can compose a message using a finite list of words, and once the message is received, it can be erased for item reuse or stored in the trainer's PC.
What is the primary effect of using the Dire Hit 2 item on a Pokémon during battle?

The Dire Hit 2 item raises the target Pokémon's critical hit rate by two stages. It can be used multiple times to increase the ratio, but the effect will wear off if the Pokémon is withdrawn from battle.
What is the primary effect of the move Body Slam when used against a target?
Body Slam inflicts regular damage and has a chance to paralyze the target.
How many PP does the move Spite remove from an opponent's last used move?
The move Spite removes 4 PP from the target's last used move.
What are the base stats and primary abilities of the Pokemon Golem?

Golem has the following base stats: HP 80, Attack 120, Defense 130, Sp. Atk 55, Sp. Def 65, and Speed 45. Its primary abilities are Rock Head and Sturdy, and it possesses the hidden ability Sand Veil.
How does Zoroark contribute to a team in the RU tier, and what are its key limitations?

Zoroark acts as a pivot in the RU tier, using its Illusion ability to create mind games and support allies with Knock Off and U-turn. Its limitations include an extremely lacking defensive profile and a reliance on Illusion, which can be easily compromised if Zoroark or its disguised Pokemon take any damage.
What is the specific effect of using a Lax Mint on a Pokémon?
When a Pokémon smells a Lax Mint, its Defense will grow more easily, while its Sp. Def will grow more slowly.
What is the specific requirement for a Hisuian Qwilfish to evolve into Overqwil?
Hisuian Qwilfish evolves into Overqwil when it is leveled up while knowing the move Barb Barrage.
What is the move Fillet Away?
Fillet Away is a move featured in the Pokémon series.
What are the common counters and checks to Grafaiai's competitive utility sets?

Grafaiai's Prankster Encore is countered by Dark-type walls and setup sweepers like Alolan Muk, Incineroar, and Tera Dark Drednaw. Poison Touch sets struggle against poison-immune Pokemon such as Copperajah, Overqwil, and Immunity Gligar. Additionally, Grafaiai struggles against Ground-types like Swampert and is fragile, making it unable to safely switch into attackers like Chandelure and Decidueye.
What are the base stats and primary abilities of the Pokemon Bisharp?
Bisharp has base stats of 65 HP, 125 Attack, 100 Defense, 60 Sp. Atk, 70 Sp. Def, and 70 Speed. Its primary abilities are Defiant and Inner Focus, and it has Pressure as a hidden ability.
At what level does Diglett evolve into Dugtrio?
Diglett evolves into Dugtrio starting at level 26.
What is the primary effect of using the Pokémon item TR17?
Using TR17 allows the user to temporarily empty its mind, which results in a sharp increase to its Sp. Def stat.
What is the evolution level for Archen to reach its next stage, Archeops?
Archen evolves into Archeops starting at level 37.

In Pokémon UNITE, using Aqua Tail increases the speed and area of effect of Azumarill's next three basic attacks for 5 seconds. If these attacks hit from a distance, they deal increased damage, restore HP, and ignore the opponent's Defense stat and shield effects. Additionally, at level 11, these ranged basic attacks reduce the cooldown of all moves by 0.5 seconds upon hitting an enemy.
At what level does a Chinchou evolve into a Lanturn?
A Chinchou evolves into a Lanturn starting at level 27.

If a Pokémon with Flash Fire is hit by a Fire-type move, it becomes immune to that move and its own Fire-type moves will inflict 1.5 times as much damage until it leaves the battle. This effect also applies to non-damaging Fire-type moves like Will-O-Wisp.
How does the Steam Engine ability affect a Pokémon's stats when hit by certain types of moves?
When a Pokémon with the Steam Engine ability is hit by a Fire-type or Water-type move, its Speed stat is drastically increased.
Why is Emboar considered an inferior wallbreaker in the RU tier compared to alternatives like Bewear or Toxicroak?

Emboar is outclassed due to its low base 65 Speed, lack of recovery, lackluster bulk, and vulnerability to entry hazards. Its ability Reckless causes it to wear down quickly, and its secondary STAB move, Superpower, reduces its defensive and offensive stats, allowing opponents to set up or force it out. Unlike alternatives such as Bewear and Toxicroak, Emboar lacks a strong defensive presence.
What are some teammates that help Grimmsnarl overcome its weakness to Steel-types?
Since Grimmsnarl relies on Sucker Punch to hit Steel-types like Alolan Sandslash, it struggles against them and appreciates teammates that can pressure them, such as Salazzle, Delphox, and Golurk.
What are the base stats and primary abilities of the Pokemon Frillish?
Frillish has base stats of 55 HP, 40 Attack, 50 Defense, 65 Sp. Atk, 85 Sp. Def, and 40 Speed. Its primary abilities are Water Absorb and Cursed Body, while its hidden ability is Damp.
What is the recommended moveset and EV spread for an offensive Hoopa in the RU tier?

Hoopa should be run with maximized Special Attack and Speed EVs. Key moves include Hyperspace Hole (or Psyshock for specially defensive targets), Shadow Ball, Focus Blast for coverage against Dark-types, and Knock Off to cripple opponents. A Life Orb is recommended to maximize damage output. While a Timid nature can outspeed certain threats, a Modest nature is generally preferred to maximize damage.
What are the base stats of the legendary Pokémon Moltres?
Moltres has the following base stats: HP 90, Attack 100, Defense 90, Sp. Atk 125, Sp. Def 85, and Speed 90.
What makes the Choice Band set for Pangoro in the RU tier so effective?

Choice Band Pangoro is highly effective because it acts as an immediate wallbreaker that can KO threats like Rhyperior and physically defensive Registeel with minimal prior damage. Unlike the Swords Dance set, it avoids being worn down by Life Orb recoil, and it utilizes moves like Bullet Punch to revenge kill weakened setup sweepers, Iron Head to 2HKO Fairy-types, and Darkest Lariat to handle Defense-boosting sweepers.
At what levels does Mudkip evolve into its subsequent forms?
Mudkip evolves into Marshtomp at level 16, and Marshtomp evolves into Swampert at level 36.
What is the function of the item TR76?
TR76 is an item that allows the user to lay a trap of levitating stones around the opposing team, which causes damage to any opposing Pokémon that switch into the battle.
What is the primary role of Choice Specs Appletun and which teammates pair well with it?

Choice Specs Appletun serves as a wallbreaker that provides significant offensive pressure. Useful teammates include VoltTurn users like Silvally formes, Rotom, and Uxie to generate momentum, as well as physical wallbreakers such as Klinklang, Sawk, and Rhydon that can handle special walls like Articuno and Clefairy.
What is the primary role of Leavanny in the PU metagame and how should it be used?

Leavanny serves as a suicide lead in the PU metagame, with its primary role being the setup of Sticky Web. It is valued for its high Speed and offensive presence compared to other Sticky Web users. For this role, it typically runs Focus Sash to guarantee setup, Chlorophyll as an ability, and a Naive nature with an EV spread designed to maximize speed and offensive utility.
How does the move Triple Axel function in battle?
Triple Axel is a move that inflicts regular damage by performing a consecutive three-kick attack, where each successful hit makes the move more powerful.
What happens to a Pokémon's stats when it has the Stamina ability and is hit by an attack?
When a Pokémon with the Stamina ability is hit by an attack, its Defense stat increases by one stage. If the Pokémon is hit by a multistrike move, the ability activates for each individual hit.
What is the historical significance of the Rusted Shield item?
The Rusted Shield is said to be the item that a hero once used to halt a terrible disaster in ancient times, although it has since become worn and rusty.
What is the recommended competitive moveset and build for a Choice Scarf Togedemaru in the NU tier?

For a fast pivoting role, Togedemaru should use a Choice Scarf with a Jolly nature and maximum investment in Attack and Speed. Key moves include U-turn for pivoting, Zing Zap and Iron Head for STAB damage and potential flinching, and Nuzzle for speed control, while Toxic can be used to cripple defensive checks like Seismitoad. The Lightning Rod ability provides a valuable Electric-type immunity, allowing it to switch into moves like Volt Switch.
What is the primary effect of the move Conversion 2?

Conversion 2 changes the user's type to a type that is either resistant or immune to the last damaging move that hit the user. This new type is chosen at random and cannot be a type the user already possesses. If no eligible type exists, the move will fail.
Under what specific conditions is the move Struggle automatically used by a Pokémon?

Struggle is used automatically when a Pokémon cannot legally use any other move, specifically when all of its move PP are exhausted or when it is under the effect of both encore and torment simultaneously.
What kind of item is Tr94, and what effect does it have?
Tr94 is a Pokémon item. When used, it allows the user to fiercely attack the target using its entire body.
What is the primary effect of the move Upper Hand when used in battle?

Upper Hand is a Fighting-type move with +3 priority. If the target has selected a priority move (from +1 to +3) and has not yet executed it, Upper Hand strikes first and causes the target to flinch. Otherwise, the move will fail.
What is the species name of Kabuto?
Kabuto is known as the Shellfish Pokémon.
What is the function of the Rainbow Pass item in Pokémon?
The Rainbow Pass is an item that provides access to the Sevii Islands. It serves as a pass for ferries traveling between Vermilion City and the Sevii Islands.
Why is Watchog considered a poor choice for a wallbreaker in the PU metagame compared to Stoutland and Kangaskhan?

Watchog is outclassed because it lacks the superior Speed tiers and wallbreaking potential of Stoutland and Kangaskhan. Furthermore, Stoutland and Kangaskhan possess the Scrappy ability, allowing them to hit Ghost-types with Normal-type moves. Watchog relies on Analytic, which requires it to move second, but its subpar bulk prevents it from surviving long enough to be effective.
What is Rolycoly?
Rolycoly is a Pokémon species as identified in the provided knowledge base entry.
What is the primary purpose of a Pineapple in Generation IX?
In Generation IX, a Pineapple is a type of ingredient that can be used to make a sandwich.
What is Volcarona's role in the OU tier and what are its primary weaknesses?

Volcarona functions as a dangerous wallbreaker and late-game sweeper in the OU tier, utilizing Quiver Dance to boost its stats. Its primary weaknesses include a 4x vulnerability to Stealth Rock, weaknesses to Water and Flying moves, a poor Defense stat that leaves it susceptible to priority attackers, and being outpaced by certain faster Pokemon or weather sweepers.
What is Drampa's role in the PU metagame and what are some of its primary offensive moves?

Drampa serves as a devastating wallbreaker in the PU metagame due to its 135 base Special Attack and expansive movepool. Its primary offensive moves include Draco Meteor, which can OHKO bulky targets like Musharna and Regirock after Stealth Rock, Hyper Voice for reliable STAB damage, Fire Blast or Flamethrower for Steel-types, Focus Blast for threats like Type: Null and Munchlax, and Energy Ball for neutral coverage against Jellicent and Fairy-types.
What happens to the user's HP and Stockpile count when the move Swallow is successfully used?
When Swallow is used after Stockpiling, it recovers the user's HP based on the number of times Stockpile was used and resets the stockpile count to 0.
What is the primary function of the toxic chains used by Pecharunt?

Pecharunt uses its toxic chains in combat to badly poison its enemies. Additionally, the chains are capable of empowering other Pokémon by using toxins to enhance aspects of their bodies, such as their muscles, brain, or looks.
At what levels does Quilava evolve in its evolutionary chain?
Quilava evolves from Cyndaquil at level 14 and evolves into Typhlosion at level 36.
What are the primary effects of the move Triple Arrows?
Triple Arrows has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit. Additionally, the move may lower the target's Defense stat or cause the target to flinch.
What are the base stats for the Pokémon Yanma?
Yanma's base stats are as follows: HP 65, Attack 65, Defense 45, Sp. Atk 75, Sp. Def 45, and Speed 95.
What is the origin of the Band Autograph item in Pokémon?
The Band Autograph is a Pokémon item signed by all the members of the Maximizers, who are the most charismatic band in the Galar region.
What happens if a Pokémon uses Thunder Shock after the move Charge in a Pokémon Contest combination?
When used in a Pokémon Contest combination, if Charge was used in the previous turn, the user gains 4 bonus appeal points.
At what level does Shroodle evolve into Grafaiai?
Shroodle evolves into Grafaiai at level 28.
What is the primary effect of the move Rage Powder in battle?
Rage Powder is a move that causes the user to draw all attacks from opponents toward itself during the turn it is used.
What is the move Tera Starstorm?
Tera Starstorm is a move described in the Pokémon knowledge base.
What role does Yveltal play in the SS Ubers metagame and how is it used effectively?

Yveltal is the most used Pokemon in SS Ubers and serves as the most reliable check to Calyrex-S. It is the metagame's most common Defogger and uses moves like Knock Off, U-turn, and Taunt for momentum and utility. Depending on team support, it can run offensive sets like Hone Claws or Choice Band, or utility sets with Roost and Toxic to handle threats like Groudon, Rayquaza, and opposing Yveltal.
How does the SubToxic Aegislash set function, and what roles does it fill on a team?

The SubToxic Aegislash set utilizes Substitute to avoid status moves and set up on passive Pokemon like Slowking or Amoonguss. It uses Toxic to stall out defensive walls like Hippowdon and Gastrodon while employing King's Shield and Leftovers for longevity. Shadow Ball serves as a powerful STAB move to pressure Toxic-immune threats like Excadrill. It fits well on bulky offense and balance teams, acting as a setup sweeper that wears down walls while checking offensive threats like Mega Latias.
What is the function of a Big Mushroom when given to the Move Reminder in Pokémon FireRed and LeafGreen?
In Pokémon FireRed and LeafGreen, a Big Mushroom can be given to the Move Reminder on Two Island in exchange for having one Pokémon relearn a move.
What status conditions can the Lumiose Galette cure when used on a Pokémon?
When used on a Pokémon, the Lumiose Galette cures all non-volatile status conditions, which include poison, paralysis, sleep, burn, and freeze, as well as confusion.
At what level does Sizzlipede evolve into Centiskorch?
Sizzlipede evolves into Centiskorch when it reaches level 28.
What is the primary effect of the Binding Band when held by a Pokémon?

The Binding Band increases the damage dealt by binding moves used by the holder. It causes these moves to inflict damage equal to 1/8 of the target's maximum HP at the end of each turn, instead of the standard 1/16. In some cases, it further increases this damage to 1/6 of the target's maximum HP.
What are the primary weaknesses of Hoopa in the RU tier, and which Pokemon can effectively check it?

Hoopa suffers from poor Speed and Defense, making it susceptible to being revenge killed or Pursuit trapped by Pokemon like Golisopod, Zygarde-10%, and Drapion. Its defensive typing also makes it vulnerable to Dark-type coverage from foes like Donphan and Mega Blastoise. Furthermore, Mismagius is often preferred over Hoopa due to its superior Speed and defensive utility.
How does the move Power Trip calculate its damage boost based on the user's stats?

Power Trip increases in power by 100% of its original value for every stage that any of the user's stats have been raised. Accuracy, evasion, and lowered stats do not affect the power. If all five of the user's stats are modified to +6, the move's power is 31 times its original value.
How many steps does a Max Repel last when used in the field?
A Max Repel prevents wild Pokémon of a lower level than the lead party Pokémon from appearing for 250 steps after its use.
What is the primary effect of the move Leech Life?
Leech Life inflicts regular damage on the target and drains half of that inflicted damage to restore the user's HP.
What is the primary role of Ferrothorn in competitive play, and why is its defensive typing advantageous?

Ferrothorn serves as an excellent defensive Steel-type and entry hazard setter. Its Grass typing grants it resistances to Water and Electric attacks and neutrality to Ground, allowing it to check threats such as Ogerpon-W, Mega Swampert, Tapu Koko, and Raging Bolt more effectively than other Steel-types like Mega Scizor or Gholdengo.
What happens when a Pokémon with the Ability Trace enters a battle?

When a Pokémon with Trace enters a battle, it copies the Ability of a random adjacent opponent, replacing the Trace Ability. If no adjacent opponents have an Ability that can be copied by Trace at the time of entry, the Ability cannot be activated until the Pokémon enters battle again.
How did the classification of the Dome Fossil change starting from Generation IV?

From Generation IV onward, the Dome Fossil is no longer considered a Key Item and is classified as a normal item. This change allows players to obtain multiples of the fossil, have Pokémon hold it, and trade it with other players.
What are the base stats of the Normal-type Pokémon Lopunny?
Lopunny's base stats are as follows: HP 65, Attack 76, Defense 84, Sp. Atk 54, Sp. Def 96, and Speed 105.
How does the success rate of the Honey Gather ability change as a Pokémon levels up?
The success rate for Honey Gather starts at 5% for levels 1–10. It increases by 5% after every tenth level, continuing until it reaches a maximum of 50% for levels 91–100.
What effect does the Pixie Plate have when held by a Pokémon?
When held by a Pokémon, the Pixie Plate increases the damage dealt by Fairy-type moves by 20%. Additionally, it changes the type of Arceus and the move Judgment to Fairy.
What are some examples of Pokémon that require a Sun Stone to evolve in Pokémon GO?

In Pokémon GO, several Pokémon require a Sun Stone to evolve, including Gloom (into Bellossom), Sunkern (into Sunflora), Cottonee (into Whimsicott), Petilil (into Lilligant), and Helioptile (into Heliolisk). Each requires a specific amount of its respective candy alongside the Sun Stone.
At what level does Swablu evolve into Altaria?
Swablu evolves into Altaria at level 35.
What happens if you use Dragon Tail on a Dynamax or Gigantamax Pokémon?
When Dragon Tail is used on a Dynamax or Gigantamax Pokémon, it will deal damage but it will not force the target to switch out.
What is the function of a Premier Ball when used in a Pokémon battle?
In a battle, a Premier Ball is used to attempt to catch a wild Pokémon with a catch rate of 1x. If it is used during a trainer battle, nothing occurs and the ball is lost.
What is the primary role of Tinkaton in competitive play and which utility moves make it effective?

Tinkaton functions as a strong Stealth Rock setter that utilizes its defensive typing to gain entry hazard opportunities. It is highly effective due to its utility moves: Knock Off, which removes items from foes; Thunder Wave, for speed control; and Encore, which allows it to lock opponents into moves to checkmate threats like Latios and Hydrapple.
What is the primary effect of the move Spore in battle?
Spore is a move that puts the target to sleep, provided it does not have an ability that prevents sleep or a protection that blocks the move.
What is the origin of Spiritomb's body and how is it related to the Odd Keystone?

Spiritomb is formed by a collection of 108 spirits that were trapped into an Odd Keystone by a traveler using a mysterious spell as punishment for their misdeeds. The Pokémon lacks a physical body and instead projects its appearance of swirling purple energy out of this trapezoidal rock, to which it remains firmly bound.
What is the function of the item Tm72?
Tm72 is an item that teaches the move Avalanche to a compatible Pokémon. This attack move inflicts double the damage if the user has been hurt by the foe in the same turn.
How is the NU tier defined in Smogon's competitive format for the SV generation?

NU (NeverUsed) is Smogon's fourth usage-based tier. It includes Pokémon not classified as OU, UU, or RU by usage, nor banned to Ubers, UUBL, RUBL, or NUBL. A Pokémon is officially NU if it makes up at least ~4.52% of the tier's total weighted usage, meaning a typical player is over 50% likely to encounter it within 15 battles.
What are the base stats and abilities for the Poison-type Pokémon Nidorina?
Nidorina has base stats of 70 HP, 62 Attack, 67 Defense, 55 Sp. Atk, 55 Sp. Def, and 56 Speed. Its available abilities are Poison Point and Rivalry, while its hidden ability is Hustle.
What is the primary role of Hawlucha on Terrain teams and how does it utilize its item?

Hawlucha functions as a threatening sweeper and late-game cleaner. It uses the Grassy Seed to activate its Unburden ability, significantly increasing its Speed to outpace most of the metagame, including Choice Scarf and Booster Energy users. The Grassy Seed also provides a Defense boost, allowing Hawlucha to safely use Swords Dance against opponents like Kingambit and Great Tusk.
What are the primary effects of using the move Lunar Blessing?
Lunar Blessing restores HP and cures status conditions for the user and their ally Pokémon currently in battle. Additionally, it causes incoming moves from opponents to become more likely to miss.
How many times can the move Rock Blast hit a target in a single turn?
Rock Blast hits the target two to five times in a row.
What is the purpose of Squirtle Candy in the game?
Squirtle Candy is a Pokémon item packed with energy that, when given to certain Pokémon, increases all of their stats at once.
What is the primary effect of the Long Reach ability in the core Pokémon games?
In the core Pokémon games, the Long Reach ability prevents the user's contact moves from activating any effects that are normally triggered by making contact.
What is the primary role of a Choice Scarf Serperior in competitive play, and what specific utility does it provide?

Choice Scarf Serperior acts as a late-game cleaner that utilizes the snowballing potential of Contrary and Leaf Storm. It uses Knock Off to remove items like Heavy-Duty Boots, Assault Vest, and Light Clay from defensive answers, while Glare is used to cripple common switch-ins like Tornadus-T and Dragonite to help teammates.
What are some of the primary checks and counters to Drednaw in competitive play?

Drednaw struggles against Grass- and Water-types like Breloom and Paldean Tauros-W, which can tank hits and KO it with Seed Bomb or Close Combat. Priority users like Toxicroak, Barraskewda, and Basculegion-M can also revenge kill it after it has taken chip damage. Additionally, Drednaw may struggle to OHKO walls like Bellibolt and Amoonguss, and specific checks like Toxicroak or Bronzong can wall it depending on its chosen coverage moves.
What are the primary reasons Hydreigon is considered to have a niche over Latios in BW competitive play?

Hydreigon's niche over Latios stems from its Pursuit resistance and superior move coverage, which allow it to more effectively defeat bulkier sand teams that typically rely on Pursuit Tyranitar to eliminate wallbreaking threats.
What is the primary role of Tapu Bulu in competitive play, and what are its potential drawbacks?

Tapu Bulu serves as a potent physical wallbreaker capable of defeating Ground- and Water-types, as well as a check to offensive threats like Thundurus, Zeraora, and Keldeo. Its drawbacks include a mediocre Speed tier, common weaknesses to Fire, Flying, and Steel-types, and a reliance on prediction to defeat walls like Mega Venusaur and Celesteela. Additionally, its Grassy Terrain can inadvertently heal opposing grounded Pokémon.
What is the purpose of the Dynamax Band item in Pokémon?
The Dynamax Band is an item that has a Wishing Star affixed to it. It emits a light that enables Pokémon to Dynamax when they are at a Power Spot.
What is the function of the red core located on Klinklang's body?

Klinklang's red core is used to store an enormous amount of energy gained from its rotating gears. This energy can be released through the spiked gear at the bottom to launch gears or fire powerful blasts of electricity.
What is the specific effect of using a Muscle Mochi on a Pokémon?
When used from the Bag on a Pokémon, a Muscle Mochi increases that Pokémon's Attack EVs by 10.
What is the unique ability shared by Frigibax and its evolutionary line?
Frigibax and its evolutions, Arctibax and Baxcalibur, are the only known Pokémon capable of having the Thermal Exchange Ability.
How does the move Follow Me function in Pokémon battles?

Follow Me is a non-damaging Normal-type move with +3 priority that forces opposing Pokémon to target the user instead of their intended target for the rest of the turn. It does not affect moves that hit multiple Pokémon, and it fails in Single Battles from Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl onwards. Certain moves like Snipe Shot and abilities like Stalwart ignore this effect.

What effect does the Deep Sea Tooth have when held by Clamperl?
When held by Clamperl, the Deep Sea Tooth doubles the holder's Special Attack stat.

When given to a Pokémon that is Lv. 30 or higher, a Mighty Candy L will increase that Pokémon’s Attack stat.
What is the recommended moveset and item for Stunfisk in competitive SM, and what is its role?

Stunfisk serves as a defensive check to physical attackers and an entry hazard setter. Its recommended moves include Stealth Rock, Discharge, Earth Power, Toxic, and Protect. Leftovers is the preferred item to provide passive recovery. Its ability, Static, helps spread paralysis to opponents, though it struggles with a lack of reliable recovery and heavy competition from other Stealth Rock users like Mudsdale.
What are the base stats of the Mythical Pokémon Pecharunt?
Pecharunt has a base HP of 88, Attack of 88, Defense of 160, Sp. Atk of 88, Sp. Def of 88, and Speed of 88.
What is the primary role of Bellibolt in competitive play and what are its main weaknesses?

Bellibolt serves as a bulky Electric-type wall that checks dangerous Flying-types like Flamigo, Kilowattrel, and Scyther, while punishing contact moves with Static and Rocky Helmet. It acts as a momentum-provider with Volt Switch. Its weaknesses include a lack of resistances, vulnerability to entry hazards if not holding Heavy-Duty Boots, and susceptibility to being used as setup fodder by poison-immune sweepers like Toxtricity, Munkidori, and Toxicroak.
What is the signature move of the Schedar Starmobile and what are its secondary effects?
The signature move of the Schedar Starmobile is Blazing Torque. It is a Fire-type move that deals damage and has a 30% chance to burn the target.
What happens when you use the move Circle Throw in a battle against a wild Pokémon?
When Circle Throw is used against a wild Pokémon, the battle ends.
How is the OU tier defined in Smogon's BW format based on usage percentage?

In Smogon's BW format, a Pokémon is designated as 'OU' if it accounts for at least ~3.41% of the total weighted usage in the tier. This percentage represents a threshold where a typical player is more than 50% likely to encounter that Pokémon at least once during 20 battles in a single day.
What is the effect of holding a Yache Berry when a Pokémon is hit by a supereffective Ice-type attack?
When a holder is hit by a supereffective Ice-type attack, it consumes the Yache Berry to halve the attack's damage. If the Pokémon has the Ripen ability, the damage is instead multiplied by 1/4.
At what level does Elekid evolve into Electabuzz?
Elekid evolves into Electabuzz starting at level 30.
What is the secondary effect of the move Aqua Step?
Besides dealing damage to the target, Aqua Step boosts the user's Speed stat.
What is the secondary effect of the move Drum Beating when used against an opponent?
Drum Beating inflicts regular damage and has a chance to lower the target's Speed stat by one stage.
What is the requirement for using a Quick Candy L to increase a Pokémon's Speed stat?
To increase a Pokémon's Speed stat using a Quick Candy L, the Pokémon must be at level 30 or higher.
What determines whether a Toxel evolves into an Amped Form or a Low Key Form Toxtricity?

The form Toxel evolves into depends on its Nature, which is unaffected by mints. If Toxel has a Hardy, Brave, Adamant, Naughty, Docile, Impish, Lax, Hasty, Jolly, Naive, Rash, Sassy, or Quirky nature, it evolves into Amped Form. If it has a Lonely, Bold, Relaxed, Timid, Serious, Modest, Mild, Quiet, Bashful, Calm, Gentle, or Careful nature, it evolves into Low Key Form.
What role does Salazzle play in the RU tier and what are its key moves?

Salazzle is a powerful RU tier sweeper known for its Nasty Plot set. Key moves include Nasty Plot to boost power, Fire Blast, and Sludge Wave for STAB coverage. Hidden Power Grass or Ice provides coverage for threats like Rhyperior or Flygon, while Taunt can shut down passive opponents. It effectively uses Poisonium Z for Acid Downpour to break through special walls.
What is the recommended EV spread and nature for Aurorus to maximize its competitive potential?

To maximize damage output, Aurorus should have maximum Special Attack investment with a Modest nature. Maximum Speed investment is also used to outspeed as many Pokemon as possible, but a Timid nature is not recommended as it does not help Aurorus outspeed any relevant targets.
What is the primary role of Regidrago in competitive play and what are its key moves?

Regidrago serves as a potent late-game sweeper and mid-game revenge killer. Its primary move is Dragon Energy, which is boosted by the Dragon's Maw ability to OHKO threats like Terrakion. Draco Meteor provides a reliable attack when HP is low, Earth Power hits Steel-types like Jirachi and Magnezone, and Tera Blast Steel is used to deal with Fairy-types like Gardevoir and Mimikyu.
What happens when a Pokémon holding a Chople Berry is hit by a supereffective Fighting-type attack?

When a Pokémon holding a Chople Berry is hit by a supereffective Fighting-type attack, it consumes the berry to halve the damage taken. If the holder possesses the Ripen ability, the damage is instead multiplied by 1/4.
What happens to a Pokémon's Speed stat when it has the Unburden Ability and loses its held item?

When a Pokémon with the Unburden Ability uses or loses its held item, its Speed stat is doubled. This effect can be triggered by moves like Knock Off, Thief, Incinerate, Bug Bite, and Pluck, or by popping an Air Balloon. The speed boost is lost if the Pokémon switches out, loses the Unburden Ability, or gains a new held item.
What is Talonflame's role in the UU metagame and what major weakness hinders its reliability?

In the UU metagame, Talonflame functions as a threatening sweeper and revenge killer for offensive teams, utilizing its ability Gale Wings and access to Swords Dance. However, its reliance on Gale Wings is significantly hindered by Stealth Rock, which removes 50% of its health upon switching in. Because any damage prevents it from utilizing its ability, Talonflame requires constant entry hazard removal and team support to remain functional.
How much PP does a Leppa Berry restore if the holder has the Ripen ability?
If a Pokémon holding a Leppa Berry has the Ripen ability, the Berry will restore 20 PP to a move that has dropped to 0 PP instead of the standard 10 PP.
What is the primary effect of the Technician ability in Pokémon?

The Technician ability increases the power of a Pokémon's moves by 1.5 times if their base power is 60 or less. This applies to standard moves as well as moves with variable power, provided their current base power is 60 or below.
What are the two primary effects of the move Teleport?
Teleport allows a trainer to warp to the last Pokémon Center visited. When used in a wild battle, the move causes the user to flee immediately.
What happens to a wild Pokémon's happiness if you successfully catch it using a Friend Ball?
If you successfully catch a wild Pokémon using a Friend Ball, its happiness starts at 200.
What are the effects of the move Parting Shot?
Parting Shot lowers all targets' Attack and Special Attack stats by one stage, and then the user switches out with a party Pokémon.

When a wild Pokémon is encountered by surfing or fishing, the Dive Ball has a catch rate multiplier of 3.5×. In other situations, it has a catch rate of 1×.
What is the recommended moveset for a Swords Dance Chien-Pao, and what are its key roles in battle?

Swords Dance Chien-Pao utilizes Icicle Crash as its strongest STAB move for coverage against Ground-types, Crunch as its reliable secondary STAB to hit targets like Necrozma-DM and Kyogre, Sucker Punch for powerful priority, and Ice Shard to revenge kill Koraidon and Miraidon. It functions primarily as a late-game cleaner and revenge killer due to its high speed and priority moves, though its frailty makes it difficult to field safely.
What makes Victini such a dangerous and unpredictable physical attacker in the BW metagame?

Victini is considered the most potent physical attacker due to the high Base Power of V-create combined with its strong stats and access to Bolt Strike for Water-types. Its unpredictability stems from its wide special movepool, allowing for mixed or special sets, and its ability to use Trick to cripple its counters. Additionally, it can pivot effectively and has useful resistances to Fighting, Grass, and Steel types.
What is Perrserker's role in the PU tier and what are some of its primary counters?

Perrserker serves as a powerful wallbreaker in the PU tier, capable of shredding defensive cores with its high Attack stat and access to coverage moves. However, it is countered by faster offensive Pokémon like Charizard, Gallade, Archeops, and Lycanroc. It also struggles against special attackers such as Galarian Articuno and Ribombee due to its low special bulk, and Fire-types like Charizard and Centiskorch pose a significant threat to its success.
How should I build a Z-Trick-or-Treat Gourgeist for competitive play?

To play Gourgeist as a Z-Move user, hold the Ghostium Z and use the move Z-Trick-or-Treat to boost all stats except HP. Use 160 Speed EVs to outspeed the unboosted metagame except for Ninjask and Electrode. Recommended moves include Phantom Force or Shadow Sneak for STAB, Return for neutral coverage, and Rock Slide to hit Fire-types. Frisk is the preferred ability despite its limited utility.
Why is Musharna considered a better choice than Mesprit for a bulky Calm Mind sweeper role?
Musharna is considered a superior choice for a bulky Calm Mind sweeper because it possesses access to reliable recovery through the move Moonlight, a feature that Mesprit lacks.
What happens if a Pokémon uses Mirror Coat after being hit by a special move?

If the last damage taken by the user was greater than 0 and dealt by a special move, Mirror Coat will deal twice that amount of damage back to the attacker. If the opponent used a physical move or did not attack, Mirror Coat will fail.
What is unique about the Throh's belt and how does it change over time?
Throh weaves its black belt from vines and ties it to increase its power. As the belt absorbs more of the Pokémon's sweat, it grows darker in color.

After inflicting regular damage, Draco Meteor causes the user's Special Attack stat to be lowered by two stages.

TR44 is a Pokémon item that allows the user to absorb mystical power from space, which results in an increase to both their Defense and Sp. Def stats.
What is the recommended EV spread and move set for a competitive Gigalith, and what role does it play?

Gigalith is an effective Stealth Rock setter that utilizes Sand Stream to boost its Special Defense by 50%. The recommended move set includes Stealth Rock, Stone Edge (or Rock Blast), Earthquake, and Toxic (or Throat Chop). The EV spread is fully invested in HP and Special Defense with a Careful nature, allowing Gigalith to function as a durable check to threats like Swellow, Salazzle, and Ninetales.
What is unique about the way Swift deals damage compared to other moves?
Swift is a move that inflicts regular damage and is unique because it ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers, ensuring that its star-shaped rays never miss the target.
What is the function of the arm-like cannons on Volcanion's back?

The arm-like cannons on Volcanion's back are used to expel high-pressure steam generated by an organ that vaporizes absorbed water at extremely high temperatures, which allows the Pokémon to disappear into dense fog.

The Power Band reduces the holder's Speed stat by 50%. Additionally, whenever the holder gains Special Defense effort from battle, it increases that effort by 4, which occurs before any PokéRUS doubling effect.

In its current state, Tail Glow increases the user's Special Attack by three stages.

The move Focus Blast inflicts regular damage and has a chance to lower the target's Special Defense by one stage.
How can Carbink be utilized effectively as a Tera Captain in competitive play?

While not a fantastic Tera Captain, Carbink is often used as a cheap secondary option. Additionally, it provides utility through access to Spikes, Stealth Rock, and dual screens.

The Stakeout ability doubles the power of moves used against targets that have switched into the battle during the same turn.

Psychic Fangs inflicts regular damage and destroys any Light Screen or Reflect barriers currently active on the target's side of the field.

If a Pokémon is holding a Power Herb, the move Bounce can be executed in a single turn instead of taking two turns to complete.

Guard Split is a move that averages the user's Defense and Special Defense stats with the target's, effectively combining them and then distributing the total equally between both Pokémon.

Magneton evolves into Magnezone when it is leveled up while in a special magnetic field or when it is exposed to a Thunder Stone.

Fidough evolves into Dachsbun at level 26.
