Unfezant suffers from a shallow movepool, forcing it to rely on weak STAB moves like Pluck and Aerial Ace or unreliable support moves like Hypnosis. It is outclassed by offensive threats like Dodrio that have stronger STAB options and better setup moves, and it is inferior to Alolan Persian as a support pivot due to Persian's higher Speed, better utility with Parting Shot, and Unfezant's weakness to Stealth Rock.
What is the primary effect of the Bone Club move?
Bone Club is a move that inflicts regular damage and has a percentage chance to make the target flinch.
What are the base stats and primary abilities of the Pokémon Dracozolt?
Dracozolt has the following base stats: HP 90, Attack 100, Defense 90, Sp. Atk 80, Sp. Def 70, and Speed 75. Its primary abilities are Volt Absorb and Hustle, while its hidden ability is Sand Rush.
What is the effect of holding a Bug Gem during a battle?
When a Pokémon holding a Bug Gem uses a damaging Bug-type move, the power of that move is increased by 1.5 times, after which the item is consumed.
What is the recommended Choice Band moveset for Krookodile in the UU metagame?

The Choice Band set utilizes Earthquake, Knock Off, Stone Edge, and either Pursuit or Superpower. It uses the Intimidate ability and a Jolly nature. EVs are invested in Attack and Speed, with 4 Defense EVs to increase survivability and optimize Stealth Rock damage. This build allows Krookodile to hit hard, outspeed threats like Lucario and Nidoking, and utilize the item to provide a significant boost to its Attack stat.
What is the function of the Mega Tiara in the Pokémon games?
The Mega Tiara is a Pokémon item containing an untold power that allows Pokémon carrying a Mega Stone to Mega Evolve during battle.
What is the purpose of the Plasma Card in Pokémon?
The Plasma Card is a Key Item introduced in Generation V that is required by the player to access restricted areas of the Plasma Frigate.
What is the effect of holding the Green Scarf in a Pokémon Contest?

The Green Scarf increases a Pokémon's Cleverness during the primary round of a Pokémon Contest, the Visual Competition of a Super Contest, and the Introduction Round of a Contest Spectacular. In Generation III, it raises the stat by 20 points, up to a total of 255 points.
What are the base stats for the Fire/Ghost type Pokémon Ceruledge?
Ceruledge has a base HP of 75, Attack of 125, Defense of 80, Sp. Atk of 60, Sp. Def of 100, and Speed of 85.
At what level does Voltorb evolve into Electrode?
Voltorb evolves into Electrode at level 30.
What are the effects of the move Glaive Rush after it is used?
After using Glaive Rush, any attacks directed at the user are guaranteed to hit and will deal double damage until the user's next turn.
What stats are increased when a Pokémon uses the move Coil, and what other moves can raise the accuracy stat?
The move Coil raises the user's Attack, Defense, and accuracy stats by one stage each. Along with Coil, the only other moves that raise the accuracy stat are Hone Claws and Acupressure.
At what level does Dwebble evolve into Crustle, and what are Crustle's primary types?
Dwebble evolves into Crustle at level 34. Crustle is a dual-type Bug and Rock Pokémon.
At what level does Dratini evolve into Dragonair?
Dratini evolves into Dragonair at level 30.
At what levels does Aron evolve into its subsequent forms?
Aron evolves into Lairon at level 32, and Lairon subsequently evolves into Aggron at level 42.
What is the function of the Magma Stone in the Pokémon games?
The Magma Stone is an item that causes the Pokémon Heatran to appear at Reversal Mountain. It was unused in games prior to Pokémon Black and White 2.
What is the secondary effect of the move Bolt Strike?
Bolt Strike inflicts regular damage and has a chance to paralyze the target.
What is the primary effect of the Oval Charm item in Pokémon?
The Oval Charm is a Pokémon item that increases the likelihood of finding Pokémon Eggs when left at the Day Care or the Nursery.
How does the move Whirlpool affect a target and how long does the effect last?

Whirlpool traps the target on the field for 2 to 5 turns, preventing them from leaving. During this time, the target is damaged for 1/16 of its maximum HP at the end of each turn, while the user remains free to use other moves.
How can a Graveler evolve into a Golem?
Graveler evolves into Golem when it is traded or exposed to a Linking Cord.
How should Pecharunt be equipped when using Foul Play as a move?
When using Foul Play to punish setup sweepers like Dragonite, Kyurem, and Terastallized Ogerpon-W, Pecharunt should be used with Tera Dark to boost the move's effectiveness.
What is the description of the move associated with the item TR63?
The item TR63 allows the user to attack with a ray of light that sparkles as if it were made of gemstones.
What is the purpose of the Pikachu Cup in Generation IX?
The Pikachu Cup is a picnic item introduced in Generation IX that serves no practical purpose other than to decorate the player's picnic.
How is the PU tier defined in Smogon's competitive format?

PU is Smogon's fifth usage-based tier. It consists of Pokémon not classified as OU, UU, RU, or NU by usage and not banned to higher tiers. A Pokémon is officially designated as PU if it makes up at least ~4.52% of total weighted usage in the tier, meaning a typical player is more than 50% likely to encounter that Pokémon at least once in 15 battles.
What is the purpose of Growlithe Candy?
Growlithe Candy is a Pokémon item packed with energy that, when given to certain Pokémon, increases all of their stats at once.
What are the base stats and primary types of the Pokémon Flamigo?
Flamigo is a Flying/Fighting type Pokémon. Its base stats are: HP 82, Attack 115, Defense 74, Sp. Atk 75, Sp. Def 64, and Speed 90.
What is the primary role of Swoobat in competitive play, and what key traits allow it to function effectively?

Swoobat functions as a special wallbreaker and revenge killer. Its effectiveness is driven by its incredible Speed, which allows it to outpace fast threats like Electabuzz, Jumpluff, and Simipour. Additionally, its STAB moves are only resisted by a few Steel-types in the tier, making it difficult to switch into, while its ability Simple makes it a great Calm Mind sweeper.
What effect does the Jade Orb have when used in the Pokémon games?
The Jade Orb is a Pokémon item that causes Rayquaza to appear in the embedded tower.
What move is taught by TM48 and what does it do?
TM48 teaches the move Skill Swap. When used, the Pokémon employs its psychic power to switch abilities with its opponent.
What is the effect of the Bouncy Bubble move?
Bouncy Bubble inflicts regular damage by shooting water bubbles at the target. Upon impact, the user absorbs water to restore its HP by half of the damage dealt to the target.
At what level does Sliggoo evolve into Goodra?
Sliggoo evolves into Goodra at level 50.
What does the move Psych Up do when used in a battle?
Psych Up allows the user to discard its own current stat changes and copy the stat changes, as well as the effects, of the target Pokémon.
What is the primary function of the Old Charm in the Pokémon series?

The Old Charm is a Key Item in Generation IV described as a good-luck charm made of Pokémon bones. In the games, it is given to the player by Cynthia to be delivered to her grandmother in Celestic Town. Successfully delivering the charm grants the player permission to investigate the town's ruins. Players can also purchase a replica of the charm to display in the Trainer Lodge after reaching friendship level 100 with Cynthia.
What happens if a trainer tries to use a move to remove the Thanks Mail item from a Pokémon holding it?
Any move attempting to remove the Thanks Mail item from the holder will fail.
What is the role of Volcarona in the BW OU tier, and what support does it require to succeed?

Volcarona is a definitive sweeper in BW OU, best suited for offensive teams. Because of its 4x weakness to Stealth Rock, it mandates Rapid Spin support. While its Quiver Dance boosts improve its power and special bulk, its physical frailty and susceptibility to Choice Scarf users like Latios, Garchomp, and Keldeo, as well as priority moves like Dragonite's Extreme Speed, necessitate team support that can handle threats its coverage moves cannot beat.
What items can Gigalith use to support its role in XY competitive battles?

Gigalith can utilize Leftovers for recovery, or Rocky Helmet to chip away at offensive pivots like Persian and Furfrou. Additionally, the Custap Berry allows Gigalith to potentially land an extra hit when at low health, while also functioning as an emergency check to sweepers if its Sturdy ability is active.
What is the specific requirement for a Lickitung to evolve into Lickilicky?
Lickitung evolves into Lickilicky when it is leveled up while it knows the move Rollout.
How does the Analytic ability affect a Pokémon's moves?
The Analytic ability increases the power of a Pokémon's moves by 1.3 times if the Pokémon moves last in a turn. This effect does not apply to the moves future sight and doom desire.
What is the primary purpose of Moomoo Cheese in the game?
Moomoo Cheese is a Pokémon item that serves as an ingredient for cooking at your camp, helping to add richness to curry.
Which teammates are considered good for Genesect in BW competitive play?

Deoxys-S, Deoxys-A, and Froslass are considered good teammates for Genesect. They pair well with its ability to lure in common targets like Latias, Palkia, and Arceus-Grass, which are vulnerable to boosted U-turns.
How does Morelull use its spores when it feels threatened?
When Morelull is in danger, it scatters spores that burst into bright, glittering sparks. The pulsing light produced by these spores is capable of inducing drowsiness in others.
What is the primary role of Armarouge in the RU tier and how does it utilize its ability Weak Armor?

Armarouge acts as both a wallbreaker and a sweeper in the RU tier. It utilizes its Weak Armor ability to increase its Speed when hit by physical attacks, such as U-turn or Rapid Spin, allowing it to overcome its naturally low base Speed. This enables Armarouge to threaten the metagame with its powerful STAB Armor Cannon, particularly against Steel-types like Jirachi, Magnezone, and Registeel.
What is the primary role of Kleavor in competitive play and what makes it an effective lead for offensive teams?

Kleavor acts as a lead for offensive teams, excelling at setting up Stealth Rock using its Stone Axe move while dealing significant damage due to its high Attack stat and Sharpness ability. Its utility as a lead is bolstered by its access to Swords Dance, which prevents it from being passive, and its ability to pivot with U-turn. Furthermore, it outperforms other leads like Terrakion and Azelf because it is not crippled by Taunt.
What is the effect of using a Timid Mint on a Pokémon?
When a Pokémon smells a Timid Mint, its Speed will grow more easily, while its Attack will grow more slowly.
What happens when a Pokémon holding a Kee Berry is hit by a physical move?
When a Pokémon holding a Kee Berry is hit by a physical move, the item is consumed and the holder's Defense is increased by one stage.
What are the effects of using the item TR15 in battle?
When TR15 is used, the target is attacked with an intense blast of all-consuming fire. This move also has the potential to leave the target with a burn.
What roles can Ribombee fill in competitive play and what are its primary weaknesses?

Ribombee is a versatile threat that can act as an offensive pivot using Sticky Web, a wallbreaker with Choice Specs, or a cleaner with Quiver Dance. It is also capable of revenge killing threats like Sneasel and Archeops. Its primary weaknesses include Steel- and Fire-type Pokémon, as well as specially defensive walls such as Aggron, Magmortar, and Gigalith, which it struggles against due to its average Special Attack and limited coverage options.
What is the primary effect of the Gorilla Tactics ability and how does it interact with a Choice Band?

Gorilla Tactics boosts a Pokémon's Attack by 50% but restricts it to using only one move, similar to the Choice Band. Because the effect stacks with Choice items, a Pokémon holding a Choice Band while possessing Gorilla Tactics will receive an Attack boost of 225%.
How many Ghost Tera Shards are required to change a Pokémon's Tera Type to Ghost?

To change a Pokémon's Tera Type to Ghost, you need to use 50 Ghost Tera Shards at the Treasure Eatery in Medali. This process is applicable to most Pokémon, with the exceptions of Ogerpon and Terapagos.
What is the recommended role and item for Okidogi in competitive play, and how do its moves help it perform?

Okidogi functions as a potent bulky attacker when equipped with an Assault Vest. Its moveset includes Knock Off to remove items from checks like Moltres and Great Tusk, while Ice Punch provides coverage against Gliscor and Dragonite. Its Poison-type STAB threatens Fairy-types, and its Fighting-type STAB targets poison-immune foes like Kingambit. This set allows Okidogi to sponge hits from offensive threats like Iron Valiant while making progress against physical walls.
What are the base stats and primary type of Poltchageist?
Poltchageist is a Grass/Ghost type Pokémon. Its base stats are 40 HP, 45 Attack, 45 Defense, 74 Sp. Atk, 54 Sp. Def, and 50 Speed.
What is the primary effect of the move Rage Powder?

Until the end of the turn, any moves that opposing Pokémon target solely at the user's ally will instead target the user. If both Pokémon on the same side of the field use this move, the one that uses it last will become the target.
What Pokémon can be obtained by giving a Cover Fossil to a scientist in a museum?
You can receive a Tirtouga by giving a Cover Fossil to a scientist in a museum.
What type of damage does the move Wing Attack inflict?
Wing Attack is a Pokémon move that inflicts regular damage.
What effect does the Steadfast ability have on a Pokémon?
The Steadfast ability boosts the Pokémon's Speed stat by one stage every time it flinches.
What are the effects of the Stalwart ability in battle?
The Stalwart ability allows a Pokémon to ignore the effects of any opposing Pokémon's abilities and moves that would otherwise draw in moves.
What are the effects of using the item TR19 in battle?
When used, TR19 allows the user to strike with a simultaneous three-beam attack. This move has the potential to leave the target with a burn, a freeze, or paralysis.
How does Accelgor effectively use its moveset and held item to serve as a late-game cleaner?

Accelgor uses Bug Buzz to trigger its held item, Throat Spray, which grants a +1 Special Attack boost. This, combined with the Unburden ability, allows it to outspeed every Pokemon in the metagame. It utilizes Focus Blast to OHKO Klinklang and Piloswine, Sludge Bomb to break through Fairy-types like Clefairy and Alcremie, and Giga Drain to 2HKO and recover health against walls like Rhydon, Palossand, and Qwilfish.
How does Shell Side Arm determine whether it will be a physical or special move?

Shell Side Arm forecasts whether its base damage would be higher as a physical move or special move and then becomes the category predicted to inflict more damage. If the potential damage is tied, the category is chosen randomly.
How does the move associated with TR34 function?
TR34 is a move where a hunk of psychic energy attacks the target two turns after the move is used.
In which generation was Yogurt introduced as an ingredient?
Yogurt was introduced in Generation IX and can be used as an ingredient for making sandwiches.
What is the primary role of Avalugg in competitive play, and what are its key strengths and weaknesses?

Avalugg is a physical wall for balanced and defensive teams, valued for its exceptional physical bulk and access to Rapid Spin and Recover. Its strengths include the ability to handle powerful physical attacks from threats like Basculegion-M and Staraptor, while using Body Press, Avalanche, and Earthquake to deal damage. However, it is extremely frail on the special side, weak to common physical wallbreakers like Incineroar, and highly dependent on Heavy-Duty Boots to avoid Stealth Rock damage.
What happens when a Pokémon with Neutralizing Gas switches out, and how does it affect other Abilities like Intimidate?

When the Pokémon with Neutralizing Gas is about to switch out, any Abilities that were suppressed and activate upon being gained will trigger before the switch occurs. For instance, if Intimidate is reactivated this way, it will lower the Attack stat of the Pokémon with Neutralizing Gas before it leaves the field, rather than affecting the incoming Pokémon.
What utility does Cinderace provide to a team in a competitive SV setting?

Cinderace functions as an offensive pivot and entry hazard controller. Its move Court Change allows it to switch hazards to the opposing side of the field and swap effects like Aurora Veil. This utility supports hazard-weak teammates like Kyurem and Tornadus-T, while Cinderace's speed and coverage moves, such as U-Turn, Sucker Punch, Gunk Shot, and High Jump Kick, allow it to remain an offensive threat.
What is the recommended Choice Scarf set for Darmanitan in the UU tier?

Darmanitan should run a Choice Scarf with a Jolly nature to maximize its cleaning and revenge killing capabilities. Its moveset includes Flare Blitz, Rock Slide, U-turn, and either Earthquake or Superpower. EV investment is maxed in Attack and Speed, with 4 EVs in Special Defense to manipulate Download boosts against Porygon-Z and Porygon2. The Sheer Force ability is used to boost the power of moves like Flare Blitz and Rock Slide.
What are the base stats and primary ability of the Paradox Pokémon Iron Leaves?
Iron Leaves has the ability Quark Drive. Its base stats are 90 HP, 130 Attack, 88 Defense, 70 Special Attack, 108 Special Defense, and 104 Speed.
What is the primary effect of the Mystic Water item when held by a Pokémon?
The Mystic Water is a type-enhancing item that boosts the power of the holder's Water-type moves. It provides a 10% boost in some instances and a 20% boost in others.
What are the primary effects of the Pokémon move Autotomize?

Autotomize raises the user's Speed stat by two stages and halves the user's weight. The weight reduction effect does not stack, and the move functions by the user shedding part of its body to become lighter and faster.
What is the purpose of the Works Key in the Pokémon games?
The Works Key, introduced in Generation IV, is a Key Item that allows the player to unlock the door to the Valley Windworks, which enables them to confront Team Galactic.
What is the function of the Mawilite in the Pokémon games?

The Mawilite is a Mega Stone that allows Mawile to Mega Evolve into Mega Mawile, provided its Trainer has a Key Stone. As a Mega Stone, it is immune to item-negating effects like Embargo or Klutz, and it cannot be removed or given to a Mawile using effects like Trick or Fling.
What roles does Genesect play in the Ubers metagame, and which Pokemon are considered its counters?

In the Ubers metagame, Genesect functions as an effective momentum gainer and revenge killer, utilizing its Download ability to boost moves like U-turn, Ice Beam, and Explosion. While it excels at revenge killing Latios, Latias, Mega Diancie, and Rayquaza, it faces significant challenges from Primal Groudon and Ho-Oh, which are considered its primary counters in the current metagame.
What is a unique property of the move Grassy Glide when used on Grassy Terrain?
When Grassy Terrain is active, the move Grassy Glide always goes first.
What is the primary purpose of the Balm Mushroom item in Pokémon?
The Balm Mushroom is a rare item that gives off a pleasant fragrance and can be sold at a high price to shops or to a maniac.
What are the base stats of the Legendary Pokémon Lunala?
Lunala has the following base stats: HP 137, Attack 113, Defense 89, Sp. Atk 137, Sp. Def 107, and Speed 97.
What are the base stats and primary abilities of the Pokémon Bibarel?
Bibarel has the following base stats: HP 79, Attack 85, Defense 60, Sp. Atk 55, Sp. Def 60, and Speed 71. Its available abilities are Simple and Unaware, while its hidden ability is Moody.
What is the primary function of the Space Mail item in Pokémon?

Space Mail is used to send short messages to other players when trading Pokémon. A trainer can compose a message using a finite list of words, and once the mail is received, it can be reused or stored in the trainer's PC.
Why does Archeops struggle to be an effective Stealth Rock suicide lead in the NU metagame?

Archeops struggles due to its Defeatist ability, a slower Speed tier compared to competitors like Aerodactyl, and the fact that dedicated suicide leads are not a very important role in the current metagame. Its lower Speed prevents it from outspeeding key threats like Sceptile and Whimsicott.
What is the secondary effect of the move Sandsear Storm?
The secondary effect of Sandsear Storm is that it may leave the target with a burn.
How does having two brains affect Duosion's behavior and abilities?

Duosion possesses two brains that think independently, which causes it to try and perform two different actions simultaneously. However, when these two brains think alike, Duosion is able to exhibit greater psychic powers, which are said to be capable of traveling up to half a mile away.
What is the primary effect of the Heavy Duty Boots item in Pokémon?
The Heavy Duty Boots are a Pokémon item that prevents the effects of any traps set on the battlefield.
What is a major defensive counter to Scrafty in SS competitive play?

Scrafty is completely countered by defensive Sylveon, which makes it deadweight in that common matchup. While Throat Chop can be used as a niche option to defeat defensive Hyper Voice Sylveon, it forces Scrafty to sacrifice the utility of Knock Off, and many Sylveons run Moonblast to bypass that strategy.
Under what condition does the move Avalanche deal double its normal power?
Avalanche deals double power if the target has inflicted damage on the user within the same turn. Note that damage from the move Pain Split does not count toward triggering this effect.
What specific requirements must be met for a Bisharp to evolve into Kingambit?
To evolve into Kingambit, a Bisharp must level up after defeating three other Bisharp that are holding a Leader's Crest.
What is the primary role of Tapu Koko in competitive play and which items are recommended for it?

Tapu Koko serves as a consistent offensive pivot that threatens various Water- and Flying-type Pokemon while checking Electric- and Fighting-types. Its recommended items are Electrium Z, which boosts Thunderbolt to pick off threats like Melmetal and Heatran or OHKO Ogerpon-W and Mega Diancie, or Fairium Z, which can be used to immediately OHKO foes such as Great Tusk and Raging Bolt.
What is the primary effect of the Misty Surge ability when a Pokémon enters a battle?
When a Pokémon with the Misty Surge ability enters a battle, it changes the terrain to Misty Terrain.
At what level does Snubbull evolve into Granbull?
Snubbull evolves into Granbull at level 23.
What are the primary effects of the Assault Vest item on a Pokémon?
The Assault Vest is a held item that increases the holder's Special Defense by 1.5 times, but it prevents the Pokémon from selecting any status moves.
What is the function of the Rm 6 Key in the Pokémon games?
The Rm 6 Key is an item used to unlock the door to Room 6 inside the Abandoned Ship.
Why is Choice Band considered an inferior item choice for Sawsbuck compared to Life Orb?
Choice Band is considered inferior because it locks Sawsbuck into a single move, preventing the player from switching moves or boosting its Attack stat using Swords Dance.
